tagline: AI Powered Personalized Health Operating System

footer.description: Chikitsak is your AI-powered personalized health operating system, providing intelligent insights and proactive care guidance.
footer.disclaimerContent: Chikitsak is an AI-powered educational tool and does not provide medical diagnosis or treatment. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional. In emergencies, call your local emergency services immediately.
footer.madeWith: Made with ❤️ for a healthier world

features.title: Everything You Need for Better Health
features.subtitle: Powered by AI, designed with care. Explore our comprehensive healthcare features.

symptom.title: AI Symptom Checker
symptom.desc: Describe symptoms and get instant AI triage with severity assessment and recommended next steps.

dashboard.title: Health Dashboard
dashboard.desc: Track your vitals, health score, and trends over time with beautiful visualizations.

meds.title: Drug Interaction Check
meds.desc: Check medication interactions, dosages, and food guidelines with AI precision.

mental.title: Mental Wellness
mental.desc: Mood tracking, guided meditation, CBT exercises, and a supportive chatbot companion.

lab.title: Lab Report Analysis
lab.desc: Upload lab reports for instant AI interpretation with flagged abnormalities and trends.

location.title: Location Health Alerts
location.desc: Real-time AQI, trending illnesses, and seasonal health risks based on your city.

hero.subtitle: Tell me your symptoms, upload a lab report, or check medication interactions — all powered by intelligent AI.
hero.clickToUploadImage: Click to upload medical image for AI analysis...

placeholders.symptom: Describe your symptoms, e.g. "I have a severe headache and fever..."
placeholders.lab: Paste your lab report values or describe them...

careAreas.title: Specialized Care for Everyone
careAreas.subtitle: Expert-curated health modules designed to provide precise guidance for every stage of life.

women.title: Women's Health
women.problems: PCOS, Hormonal imbalance, Iron deficiency, Thyroid disorders
women.solutions: Cycle tracking, Nutritional planning, AI risk detection, Preventive screenings

men.title: Men's Health
men.problems: Testosterone imbalance, Cardiovascular risk, Mental stress, Metabolic syndrome
men.solutions: AI-based risk assessment, Personalized health scoring, Evidence-based lifestyle recommendations, Screening reminders

child.title: Child Health
child.problems: Developmental delays, Viral infections, Nutritional gaps, Vaccination schedules
child.solutions: Growth monitoring, AI-based symptom triage, Immunization alerts, Pediatric dietary guidance

senior.title: Senior Care
senior.problems: Osteoarthritis, Cognitive decline, Polypharmacy, Heart failure
senior.solutions: Mobility tracking, Cognitive health monitoring, Medication reconciliation, Integrated chronic care

pregnancy.title: Pregnancy & Baby
pregnancy.problems: Gestational diabetes, Pre-eclampsia, Newborn jaundice, Postpartum depression
pregnancy.solutions: Weekly development tracking, Vitals monitoring, Newborn care AI, Postnatal support

sexual.title: Sexual Health
sexual.problems: STIs, Infertility, Sexual dysfunction, Contraceptive awareness
sexual.solutions: Anonymous screenings, Fertility window tracking, AI clinical guidance, Safe practice educational modules

nutrition.title: Nutrition & Diet
nutrition.problems: B12/D3 deficiency, Weight management, Gut health issues, Type-2 Diabetes
nutrition.solutions: AI Meal analysis, Personalized micro-nutrient scoring, Gut-health optimization, Real-time glucose-aware dieting

mental.title: Mental Health
mental.problems: Anxiety disorders, Depression, Chronic stress, Sleep disorders
mental.solutions: AI mood tracking, CBT exercises, Guided breathing, Professional referral support

about.description: Experience the future of healthcare with our advanced AI triage engine. Get instant analysis of your symptoms, personalized care plans, and real-time health insights — all in one platform.

locationHealth.title: Location Health
locationHealth.subtitle: Health alerts and environmental data for your city

disclaimer.title: Important Medical Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: Chikitsak provides AI-generated health information and is not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
disclaimer.checkboxLabel: I understand that Chikitsak provides AI-generated health information and is not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.

warnings.medicationWarning: Always consult a licensed physician before starting or stopping medication.
